title: Contributor
description: A researcher who contributes facts to the spec. Provenance entries reference these ids to record WHO contributed what.

id.description: Stable contributor id; typically the lowercased GitHub handle. Matches the file name.

github.description: GitHub handle (without @). The verifiable identity that backs this contributor.

techniques.description: Technique ids this contributor commonly uses (must be in the fixed technique set).

tools.description: Tool ids this contributor commonly uses (must match spec/tools/).

flavors.description: Flavor ids this contributor maintains or works on (must match spec/flavors/). A flavor is an independent reimplementation, distinct from an evidence-gathering tool.

links.description: Optional proof/identity links (profile, key fingerprint, site).
